sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Millicom International Cellular SA stock hits 52-week high at 85.1 USD
feed.summary: Millicom International Cellular SA (TIGO) stock has reached a 52-week high of $85.05, with shares currently trading at $85.08, marking a 163% surge over the past year. This achievement reflects strong investor confidence and positive market sentiment, supported by the company's "GREAT" financial health score and its classification as undervalued by InvestingPro. Recent corporate activities include strong Q4 2025 financial results ($1.55 billion service revenues, $778 million adjusted EBITDA), the acquisition of the remaining equity in Colombia Telecomunicaciones, and strategic financial transactions.

feed.title: Corporación Inmobiliaria Vesta (VTMX) adopts comprehensive bylaw restatement
feed.summary: Corporación Inmobiliaria Vesta has filed a Form 6-K to provide a certification and English translation of its fully restated bylaws. This updated document formally establishes the company's capital structure, share classes, shareholder rights, and governance framework in accordance with Mexican corporate and securities law. Key updates include strict change-in-control provisions, enhanced minority shareholder protections, and a defined Board of Directors with a minimum of 25% independent members.

feed.title: CEO pay, board changes and reverse split at VolitionRx (NYSE: VNRX)
feed.summary: VolitionRx Limited filed an amendment to its annual report, providing detailed Part III information on directors, executive officers, governance, and compensation. The filing also clarifies a one-for-twenty reverse stock split effective April 28, 2026, which retroactively adjusts all share data. As of June 30, 2025, non-affiliate common stock had a market value of $72,909,373, and as of April 28, 2026, there were 8,087,955 common shares outstanding. CEO Cameron Reynolds' total 2025 compensation was $638,233.

feed.title: Western Alliance (NYSE: WAL) sets Q2 common and preferred dividends
feed.summary: Western Alliance Bancorporation announced that its board of directors declared regular quarterly cash dividends for both its common and preferred stock. A cash dividend of $0.42 per share on common stock will be paid on May 29, 2026, to shareholders of record on May 14, 2026. Additionally, a quarterly dividend of $106.25 per share, equivalent to $0.265625 per depositary share, was approved for its 4.250% Fixed Rate Reset Non-Cumulative Perpetual Preferred Stock, Series A, payable on June 30, 2026, to shareholders of record on June 15, 2026.

feed.title: Vanguard (VSAT) reports 6.89M shares, 5.07% stake (Schedule 13G)
feed.summary: Vanguard Capital Management has reported a 5.07% stake in Viasat Inc., holding 6,894,130 shares of common stock as of March 31, 2026. The Schedule 13G filing indicates Vanguard has sole dispositive power over all these shares but sole voting power for a smaller portion, 1,058,256 shares. This passive investment disclosure outlines Vanguard's aggregated holdings across its managed funds and affiliated entities.

feed.title: VWO ETF Gains 1.5%
feed.summary: The VWO ETF finished the day with a 1.5% gain. This positive movement indicates an upward trend for the fund.

feed.title: Vir Biotechnology (VIR) CEO shifts 467,064 shares into family trust
feed.summary: Vir Biotechnology's President & CEO, Marianne De Backer, has restructured her common stock holdings, reclassifying a total of 467,064 shares into a family trust for tax and estate planning. This transaction, reported via Form 4, involves two entries of 233,532 shares each, shifting ownership without consideration rather than a market buy or sell. Following the changes, she holds 714,613 direct shares and 286,650 indirect shares through the Ureel-De Backer Family Trust.

The page also offers features for receiving stock news and ratings for VACI.

feed.title: USA Compression Adds Independent Director to General Partner Board
feed.summary: USA Compression Partners, LP announced the appointment of Jim S. Holotik as an independent director to the board of USA Compression GP, LLC, effective April 28, 2026. This move by Energy Transfer LP strengthens the governance structure of the compression provider, with Holotik receiving standard compensation, including an initial grant of 2,500 phantom units. Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, rates USAC as Neutral, noting strong operating performance tempered by leverage risk and a mixed valuation.

feed.title: ETF Prime: Quality & Tech Strategies in Focus
feed.summary: This ETF Prime episode features Lance Humphrey of Victory Capital and Dom Rizzo of T. Rowe Price discussing investing strategies. Humphrey elaborates on defining quality through free cash flow yield, highlighting Victory Capital's free cash flow ETFs. Rizzo, portfolio manager of the T. Rowe Price Technology ETF, details its "all-weather" approach, including holdings in private companies and its exposure to Magnificent Seven stocks.

feed.title: [10-Q] UNITED STATES LIME & MINERALS INC Quarterly Earnings Report
feed.summary: United States Lime & Minerals (NASDAQ: USLM) reported a modest decline in first-quarter 2026 earnings, with net income falling 10.4% to $30.6 million, or $1.06 per diluted share, compared to $34.1 million, or $1.19 per diluted share, in Q1 2025. Revenues decreased 3.7% to $87.8 million due to softer demand from construction, oil and gas, and roof shingle customers, despite stronger steel demand and higher fuel and transportation costs. The company maintains a strong financial position with $383.2 million in cash and no debt, while continuing significant investment in a $65 million vertical kiln project in Texas expected to start up in summer 2026.

feed.title: Valneva (VALN) prices €37m private placement with attached warrants
feed.summary: Valneva SE has successfully completed a private placement to raise €37 million through the issuance of 15,893,817 new ordinary shares, each bundled with a warrant, priced at €2.33 per unit. The private placement included participation from existing and new institutional investors like Frazier Life Sciences, TCGX, Deep Track Capital, and others. If all attached warrants are exercised, Valneva could raise an additional €47 million, with funds intended to advance its vaccine pipeline, grow its commercial business, and support general corporate purposes.

feed.title: [144] USCB FINANCIAL HOLDINGS, INC. SEC Filing
feed.summary: This article details a Form 144 SEC filing by USCB Financial Holdings, Inc. on April 30, 2026, for the proposed sale of 182,570 shares of Class A Voting Common Stock with an aggregate market value of $3,378,000. The securities were acquired on April 30, 2026, via an option exercise from the Issuer, with payment made through cash withholding. The filing indicates a neutral impact and sentiment regarding the transaction.

feed.title: VITL SHAREHOLDER ALERT: Bronstein, Gewirtz and Grossman, LLC Announces that Vital Farms, Inc. Shareholders with Losses Have Opportunity to Lead Class Action Lawsuit!
feed.summary: Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman, LLC has announced a class action lawsuit against Vital Farms, Inc. (NASDAQ:VITL) and its officers. The lawsuit alleges that Vital Farms made false and misleading statements regarding the risks and impact of delays in rolling out its new enterprise resource planning (ERP) system, leading to missed earnings guidance for 2025. Investors who purchased Vital Farms securities between May 8, 2025, and February 26, 2026, are encouraged to join the lawsuit and can seek to be appointed as lead plaintiff by May 26, 2026.

feed.title: Vista Gold (NYSE: VGZ) widens Q1 2026 loss but lifts cash to $52.7M
feed.summary: Vista Gold Corp. reported a Q1 2026 net loss of $3.1 million, an increase from $2.7 million in Q1 2025, but significantly boosted its cash and cash equivalents to $52.7 million. This increase was driven by a $42.0 million net proceeds from an underwritten public offering of 17,940,000 common shares. The company remains debt-free and plans to use the strengthened balance sheet to advance permit modifications, pre-development optimization work, and team expansion for its Mt Todd gold project in Australia, targeting detailed engineering and design in 2027.

feed.title: Vanguard Capital Management (NYSE: VECO) holds 3.09M shares, 5.12%
feed.summary: Vanguard Capital Management reported a passive investment of 3.09 million shares, representing 5.12% of Veeco Instruments Inc.'s common stock, as of March 31, 2026. This Schedule 13G filing indicates that Vanguard holds sole dispositive power over all these shares and sole voting power over a subset of 449,632 shares. The filing underscores a significant, but non-influential, ownership stake by the asset manager.

feed.title: Shareholders at UMB Financial (NASDAQ: UMBF) approve directors, pay and 2026 auditor
feed.summary: UMB Financial Corporation shareholders approved all 14 director nominees, executive compensation on an advisory basis, and the engagement of KPMG LLP as the independent auditor for 2026 at their annual meeting on April 28, 2026. They also greenlit the Amended and Restated UMB Financial Corporation Omnibus Incentive Compensation Plan. A quorum was achieved with 70,379,421 shares represented out of 76,136,588 eligible to vote.

feed.title: Ur-Energy restarts decades-old Wyoming uranium mine
feed.summary: Ur-Energy has restarted uranium mining operations at its Shirley Basin project in central Wyoming, marking the first activity there since 1992. The company, which acquired Pathfinder in 2013, has successfully transitioned the site into an in-situ recovery (ISR) mine, capable of annual production up to 2 million lb of uranium oxide. This move expands Ur-Energy's U.S. uranium production capacity amidst a global resurgence in interest for nuclear energy.

The company will host a conference call the following day, May 5, 2026, at 8:30 AM Eastern Time to discuss these results. Investors can access dial-in numbers, a live webcast, and a replay on the company's Investor Relations website.

feed.title: UNITED HOMES LAWSUIT ALERT: Bragar Eagel & Squire, P.C.
feed.summary: Bragar Eagel & Squire, P.C. has announced a class action lawsuit against United Homes Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: UHG) on behalf of investors who purchased securities between May 19, 2025, and February 22, 2026. The lawsuit alleges that United Homes' controlling shareholder, Nieri, intended to force a sale of the company and took actions to devalue it, not acting in the best interest of public investors. Investors have until June 9, 2026, to apply to be lead plaintiff.

feed.title: Twin Disc's $0.04 dividend will be paid June 1 to holders on May 18
feed.summary: Twin Disc (NASDAQ: TWIN) announced a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.04 per share. The dividend is payable on June 1, 2026, to shareholders of record at the close of business on May 18, 2026. The announcement did not include accompanying earnings, cash balance, or guidance figures.

feed.title: Twin Disc declares $0.04 quarterly dividend
feed.summary: Twin Disc, Inc. announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.04 per share, payable on June 1, 2026, to shareholders of record as of May 18, 2026. The company, which designs and manufactures marine and off-highway power transmission equipment, recently reported an EPS of $1.55 for Q2 2026, surpassing forecasts, though revenue fell short of expectations. These developments highlight the company's financial performance and investor sentiment.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley delays Fed cut call to 2027 (more info). Middle East risk drives dollar
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley has revised its Federal Reserve forecast, pushing back anticipated quarter-point rate cuts from 2026 to January and March 2027, citing sticky inflation and a hawkish shift in the FOMC. The terminal range is now seen at 3.0-3.25%. Concurrently, the firm notes that the euro has decoupled from rate differentials against the dollar, driven by Middle East geopolitical risks and the dollar's safe-haven appeal, expecting this dynamic to shift once tensions de-escalate.

feed.title: Analysts Have Conflicting Sentiments on These Energy Companies: Devon Energy (DVN) and Antero Resources (AR)
feed.summary: Analysts are presenting conflicting sentiments for energy companies Devon Energy (DVN) and Antero Resources (AR). While William Blair maintained a Buy rating for Devon Energy, Roth MKM issued a Hold rating for Antero Resources. Despite the mixed individual ratings, both companies generally hold a "Strong Buy" consensus among analysts, with specific price targets and potential upsides noted.

feed.title: Edison International reports Q1 EPS $1.42, consensus $1.33
feed.summary: Edison International (EIX) announced its Q1 earnings, reporting an EPS of $1.42, surpassing the consensus estimate of $1.33. The company's revenue for the quarter was $4.10 billion, slightly below the consensus of $4.13 billion. CEO Pedro J. Pizarro expressed satisfaction with the start to the year, highlighting strong execution and operational progress in making communities safer and more resilient, particularly concerning wildfire mitigation and rebuilding efforts.

feed.title: Adobe CEO Shantanu Narayen sells $18.2m in company stock
feed.summary: Adobe CEO Shantanu Narayen sold 75,000 shares of Adobe Inc. stock for over $18.2 million on April 28, 2026, primarily for tax and estate planning. Despite the sale, which was executed through a family trust, Narayen still holds a significant amount of Adobe shares. The stock's valuation is mixed, with some analysts seeing it as undervalued while others express concerns about increased competition.

feed.title: RTX Corporation raises quarterly dividend by 7.4% to $0.73/share
feed.summary: RTX Corporation has announced a 7.4% increase in its quarterly dividend, raising it to $0.73 per share. This decision reflects the company's commitment to returning value to shareholders and its confidence in future financial performance.

feed.title: MGM Resorts International Q1 EPS Recovery Tests Bullish Margin Improvement Narratives
feed.summary: MGM Resorts International reported Q1 2026 revenue of US$4.5 billion and basic EPS of US$0.49, with a trailing 12-month net profit margin of 1.1% after a significant one-off loss. While analysts anticipate future earnings and margin growth, recent quarterly results have been volatile, making underlying profitability recovery a key point for investors to watch. The company's high P/E ratio and debt levels also present mixed signals for potential investors, contrasting with a much higher DCF fair value.

feed.title: Earnings Call Summary | Titan International(TWI.US) Q1 2026 Earnings Conference
feed.summary: This article provides an earnings call summary for Titan International (TWI.US) Q1 2026. It details key financial results and operational highlights from the conference, offering insights into the company's performance during the quarter.

feed.title: Assessing Uranium Energy (UEC) Valuation After Burke Hollow Approval Spurs New ISR Uranium Operations
feed.summary: Uranium Energy (UEC) has received approval to begin operations at its Burke Hollow project, marking the first new in situ recovery uranium operation in over a decade. This regulatory win follows a positive period for UEC's stock performance. While one valuation model suggests UEC is undervalued by 10.5% at $14.89, another discounted cash flow model suggests it is 43.6% undervalued, prompting investors to assess if the market fully reflects the potential growth from this development.

feed.title: Grupo Televisa (NYSE: TV) posts 2025 revenue, net loss and details new Mexican telecom rules
feed.summary: Grupo Televisa, S.A.B. filed its Form 20-F annual report, detailing a net loss of U.S.$496 million from continuing operations on revenues of U.S.$3,268 million for 2025. The company also outlined its capital structure, significant Mexican telecom and antitrust regulatory changes, and various macroeconomic and political risks. Despite the net loss, Televisa maintains a dividend policy, though no dividend was proposed for 2026 to prioritize telecom opportunities and deleveraging.

feed.title: TechTarget Adopts New Executive Incentive Compensation Plans
feed.summary: TechTarget, Inc. (TTGT) has implemented new executive incentive compensation plans aimed at more closely linking senior leaders' pay to revenue growth, operating profit, and stock performance. These plans include a multi-year Growth Acceleration Plan with synthetic share-based cash awards and a 2026 Short-Term Incentive Plan featuring annual cash bonuses, both designed to sharpen management's focus on top-line expansion, profitability, and shareholder value. Despite these strategic incentives, TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, rates TTGT as Neutral due to weak financial performance and negative earnings, tempered by some positive technical indicators and operational progress.

feed.title: Earnings Flash (UMH) UMH Properties, Inc. Reports Q1 Revenue $65.8M, vs. FactSet Est of $59.4M
feed.summary: UMH Properties, Inc. announced its Q1 revenue reached $65.8 million, surpassing FactSet's estimated $59.4 million. The company also expects its 2026 normalized FFO to range from $0.98 to $1.04, compared to FactSet's estimate of $0.99. Additionally, UMH Properties reported Q1 normalized FFO of $0.23, which matched FactSet's estimate.

feed.title: UMH PROPERTIES, INC. REPORTS RESULTS FOR THE FIRST QUARTER ENDED MARCH 31, 2026
feed.summary: UMH Properties, Inc. reported an 8% increase in Total Income for Q1 2026, reaching $65.8 million, with Net Income Attributable to Common Shareholders at $2.6 million, or $0.03 per diluted share. Despite challenges from harsh winter weather and increased interest expenses, the company saw growth in rental and related income, community NOI, and same-property occupancy. UMH tightened its Normalized FFO guidance for the full year 2026 to $0.98-$1.04 per diluted share, anticipating continued growth in the coming quarters.
